gates.title: Kurulum kapısı — servis, IPC, API fail-closed
gates.titleEn: Install gate — services, IPC, API fail-closed
gates.purpose: systemd, --health, metrics :9091, API_BIND ve nginx formatının yeşil matrisi.
gates.purposeEn: systemd, --health, metrics :9091, API_BIND and nginx format green matrix.

gates.title: Yerel güvenlik denetimi — IPC, JWT, token sızıntısı
gates.titleEn: Local security audit — IPC, JWT, secret hygiene
gates.purpose: Laptop/prod öncesi güvenlik script matrisi; demo parola laptop'ta WARN kabul.
gates.purposeEn: Pre-prod security script matrix; demo password WARN on laptop is OK.

gates.title: API fail-closed — tokensiz istek 403
gates.purposeEn: Ban/consult/metrics endpoints reject requests without a token.

gates.title: auth.log sshd ingest — parse + brute esigi
gates.titleEn: auth.log sshd ingest — parse + brute threshold
gates.purpose: nginx disi SSH failed-password satirlari anomaly hattina girer.
gates.purposeEn: Non-nginx SSH failed-password lines enter the anomaly path.

gates.title: journald export — short-iso + sudo rhost spike
gates.titleEn: journald export — short-iso + sudo rhost spike
gates.purpose: journald usec timestamp ve sudo rhost brute spike ingest.
gates.purposeEn: Journald usec timestamps and sudo rhost brute spike ingest.

gates.title: Helm chart — template smoke
gates.purpose: K8s musteri kurulumu icin helm template dogrulamasi.
gates.purposeEn: Helm template validation for customer K8s installs.

gates.title: Wasm marketplace — imzali paket kapisi
gates.purposeEn: Proves unsigned marketplace packages are rejected.

gates.title: Mesh etcd — filo politika
gates.purpose: etcd mesh backend ve MESH_PUB_ENABLED=0 dogrulamasi.
gates.purposeEn: etcd mesh backend and MESH_PUB_ENABLED=0 validation.

gates.title: VM demo kapısı — post_install 0 FAIL
gates.purpose: Laptop/VM sunum öncesi son kontrol (onarim: sudo vm_demo_gate).
gates.purposeEn: Final check before laptop/VM demo (repair: sudo vm_demo_gate).
